title: strychnos ngouniensis
intro: Strychnos ngouniensis, also known as the Ngounié strychnine tree, is a species of plant in the Loganiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Strychnos ngouniensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves or bark, and can be used in the form of teas, infusions, or topical applications.
